title: Project Manager - Mechanical Systems
description_raw:
Randstad USA are seeking an experienced Project Manager for a contract assignment in New York. The role involves managing mechanical systems delivery for a large commercial construction project.

Key responsibilities:
- Manage the project plan, risk register, and milestone schedule
- Lead stakeholder management across the client and subcontractor teams
- Coordinate HVAC and mechanical plant installation activities
- Administer contract documents and change control

Requirements:
- 5+ years mechanical project management experience
- PMP certification preferred

Rate: USD 750 per day
Duration: 6 months
Start: August 2026
Location: New York, NY
